name: Combat Online 2
author: Poki
description: Combat Online 2 is a multiplayer FPS that brings non-stop action and intense battles right to your screen! Jump into fast-paced gunfights across a variety of maps and modes, whether you're into close combat or team play, there's always a fun game waiting for you. Lock, load, and dominate the battlefield! How to play Combat Online 2? Move: WASD or the arrow keys Shoot: left click Camera: use your mouse to change the camera angle Jump: the space bar Change weapons: 1-9 number keys Sprint: Shift Menu: Tab Who created Combat Online 2? Combat Online 2 is created by NadGames. Play their other games on Poki: Bomber Royale , PixWars 2 , Rebels Clash , Combat Reloaded , Combat Reloaded 2 and Combat Online ! How can I play Combat Online 2 for free? You can play Combat Online 2 for free on Poki. Can I play Combat Online 2 on mobile devices and desktop? Combat Online 2 can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets. Can I play Combat Online 2 with my friend? Yes! Combat Online 2 is a multiplayer game so you can play it with your friends online!
